/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/common/log.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/common/hashmap.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/common/notification.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/core/filter.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/core/state_table.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/core/live_capture.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/dpi/dpi.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/dpi/http_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/dpi/dns_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/dpi/tls_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/waf/waf.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/ids_ips/ids.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/ids_ips/ips.c.o CMakeFiles/sentinel_x.dir/src/zero_trust/trust_engine.c.o -o sentinel_x
